channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ten injured after turbulence on Cathay Pacific flight from Brisbane to Hong Kong
item.description: A Cathay Pacific flight travelling from Brisbane to Hong Kong experienced severe turbulence that left ten people injured during a routine meal service. Flight CX156, operated by an Airbus A350-941, en...

item.title: TD focuses on Canadian operations to support growth amid U.S. regulatory constraints
item.description: Toronto-Dominion Bank is increasingly relying on its Canadian operations to drive future growth as it works through significant regulatory and financial setbacks in the United States. After pleading g...

item.title: Rivers State Government Commends Anglican Church for Role in Peace, Education and Social Development
item.description: The Rivers State Government has openly appreciated the Church of Nigeria (Anglican Communion) for its consistent contributions to the development of the state, especially in promoting peace, unity, an...

item.title: Trump Faces Growing Republican Opposition as Iran Peace Negotiations Advance
item.description: The article discusses mounting political tensions within Republican circles as President Donald Trump moves closer to a possible negotiated agreement with Iran aimed at ending the ongoing U.S. conflic...

item.title: Iran Air Flight Attendants and Their Role in Pre-1979 Revolutionary Iran
item.description: Before the 1979 Iranian Revolution, Iran Air, known as Homa after a mythical Persian griffin, stood as one of the world's fastest-growing and most prestigious airlines. Its flight attendants represent...

item.title: Castle Lager launches nationwide search for Bafana Bafana’s most loyal supporter ahead of FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: South Africa’s qualification for the FIFA World Cup 2026 after a 16-year absence has inspired a nationwide campaign celebrating the country’s most dedicated Bafana Bafana supporters. Castle Lager, one...

item.title: Opinion: Why society should stop glorifying polygamy
item.description: This opinion piece argues that modern society, particularly in Kenya, should reconsider and ultimately stop glorifying polygamy. The author critiques both the historical justification and the contempo...

item.title: 430,000-Year-Old Wooden Tools Found in Greece Reveal Advanced Early Human Skills
item.description: An international team of researchers has uncovered what are believed to be the oldest known hand-held wooden tools ever used by humans, dating back approximately 430,000 years. The discovery was made ...

item.title: Supreme Court clarifies that no final ruling has been issued on Dela Rosa’s ICC-related petition
item.description: The Supreme Court clarified that it has not yet released any main or final decision regarding the petition filed by Senator Ronald Dela Rosa in connection with the International Criminal Court (ICC). ...

item.title: MOSIEND Calls for Justice, Restructuring and Equity at Isaac Boro Memorial
item.description: The Movement for the Survival of the Izon Ethnic Nationality in the Niger Delta (MOSIEND) has used the 58th Isaac Adaka Boro Day commemoration to highlight ongoing injustices facing the Niger Delta re...

item.title: Listener surprises young radio host with Beck concert ticket after on-air comment
item.description: The article recounts a formative experience from a former youth radio presenter in Brisbane, Australia, who, as a university student in 2003, was struggling financially and unable to afford concert ti...

item.title: Ronwen Williams proud as Mamelodi Sundowns clinch second CAF Champions League title
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns captain Ronwen Williams expressed immense pride after leading his side to a historic CAF Champions League triumph, securing their second continental title. The South African giants w...

item.title: Regional health bodies strengthen cross-border Ebola surveillance and response in East and Central Africa
item.description: Health authorities in Tanzania, Uganda, and neighbouring countries have intensified joint surveillance and emergency preparedness measures following a growing Ebola Virus Disease (EVD) outbreak in the...

item.title: Matthew Anderson: Life and Career After The Dead Files TV Show
item.description: Matthew Anderson is well known for his role in the paranormal investigation show The Dead Files, where he worked as assistant to psychic medium Amy Allan. He joined the programme in 2011 and featured ...

item.title: Rahul’s 60 and Kuldeep’s 3/29 power Delhi Capitals to 40-run win over KKR in IPL 2026 league finale
item.description: Delhi Capitals ended their IPL 2026 campaign on a positive note with a comprehensive 40-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders in the final league match at Eden Gardens, Kolkata. Batting first after K...

item.title: Trump Calls for Stronger White House Security After Gunman Was Shot by Secret Service
item.description: US President Donald Trump has called for stronger security measures around the White House after Secret Service agents shot and killed a gunman outside the presidential complex on Saturday evening. Th...

item.title: Computer Classroom Practices and Technology in 1972
item.description: The article describes what computer science education looked like in 1972, a period when computing technology was still in its early stages and largely inaccessible compared to today. Computer classes...

item.title: RR Pogoy Steps Up as TNT Triumphs Over Meralco Without Import Player in PBA Match
item.description: In a thrilling PBA Commissioner's Cup game, TNT Tropang Giga secured a hard-fought victory against Meralco Bolts even without their import player. RR Pogoy emerged as the standout performer, deliverin...

item.title: Vancouver man to serve additional 227 days in custody after multiple assaults, including attack on teenager
item.description: A Vancouver man has been sentenced following a series of violent and sexually inappropriate offences committed against multiple women between 2024 and 2025, including a particularly disturbing assault...

item.title: Mustapha Sule Lamido emerges PDP governorship candidate for Jigawa 2027, vows reforms
item.description: Mustapha Sule Lamido has emerged as the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) governorship candidate for Jigawa State ahead of the 2027 general elections after being affirmed through a consensus process duri...
